title: Special projects
summary: Impactful scientific work requires working on the right problems—problems which are not just interesting, but whose solutions matter.
summaryZh: 有影响力的科学工作需要解决正确的问题，这些问题不仅有趣，而且其解决方案也很重要。
highlights: Impactful scientific work requires working on the right problems—problems which are not just interesting, but whose solutions matter.
